meta.title: ElevenCreative Explained
meta.subtitle: ElevenLabs' all-in-one AI workspace for speech, music, video, and global localisation
meta.author: Imbila.AI

summary: ElevenCreative is ElevenLabs' end-to-end AI creative platform that brings speech synthesis (V3), sound effects, music generation (Eleven Music), image creation, and video production into a single browser-based workspace. It includes Studio (timeline editor) and Flows (node-based pipeline canvas) for batch-producing localised campaign variants across 70+ languages. Part of ElevenLabs' three-platform family alongside ElevenAgents (conversational AI) and ElevenAPI (developer infrastructure). $11B valuation as of February 2026.

products.name: Speech — Eleven V3
products.description: V3 TTS model supporting 70+ languages with inline audio tags for emotional direction ([whispers], [excited], [sighs]). Text-to-Dialogue mode for multi-speaker conversations. 10,000+ community voices plus Instant and Professional voice cloning.

products.name: Eleven Music
products.description: Launched August 2025. Generates full tracks from text prompts with or without vocals, in multiple languages. Commercially licensed for ads, film, TV, podcasts, social media, and games.

products.name: Sound Effects
products.description: On-demand sound effect generation integrated into both Studio and Flows as a native node type. SFX can be layered directly into compositions.

products.name: Image & Video
products.description: Integrates 35+ third-party image and video models including Google Veo, OpenAI Sora, Kling, Wan, and Seedance. Lip-sync connects generated video with voice output. No separate subscriptions needed.

products.name: Studio
products.description: Traditional linear timeline for frame-by-frame editing with separate tracks for video, audio, music, and captions. Best for precise finishing: trimming, layering, and manual track adjustments.

products.name: Flows
products.description: Launched March 2026. Visual pipeline builder where you chain models on an infinite canvas. Re-run any single node without regenerating the full chain. Designed for batch production of campaign variants. API access planned.

content_creation.description: Generate, edit, and localise speech, music, image, and video. Includes Studio (timeline), Flows (canvas), and the Iconic Voice Marketplace.

conversational_ai.description: Real-time voice and chat agents for customer support, sales, and interactive experiences. Powered by V3 Conversational. Used by Deutsche Telekom, Revolut, Klarna.

developer_platform.description: Programmatic access to all ElevenLabs models via REST API, Python SDK, and TypeScript SDK. Streaming, batch processing, SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR compliance. Global routing.

use_when: You produce ad creative in multiple languages and need same-day turnaround on localised variants.
You want one workspace for voice, music, SFX, and video instead of managing 5+ separate tools and subscriptions.
Your workflow involves batch-producing campaign variants with systematic swaps (avatars, hooks, voices, languages) — this is exactly what Flows was built for.
You need commercially licensed AI music and don't want to negotiate separate music rights for each campaign.
skip_when: You need deep, frame-level video editing — Studio is competent but won't replace dedicated NLEs like Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve.
Your use case is purely conversational AI (phone agents, chatbots) — ElevenAgents is the right product, not ElevenCreative.
Budget is tight and volume is low. Credit-based pricing burns fast during experimentation. If you're producing one video a month, the ROI doesn't stack up.
You need enterprise-grade Professional Voice Clones on V3 — PVC optimisation is still in progress and clone quality may lag earlier models.
You require fully self-hosted or air-gapped deployment. ElevenCreative is cloud-only.

use_cases.title: Performance Marketing — A/B Testing at Scale
use_cases.description: Use Flows to build a reusable pipeline, then swap hooks, avatars, voices, and languages systematically to produce hundreds of ad variants from a single creative architecture.

use_cases.title: Global Localisation — 70+ Language Dubbing
use_cases.description: Dub existing video or audio content into 70+ languages with lip-sync. ElevenLabs Productions offers managed services for high-volume dubbing, subtitling, and transcription.

use_cases.title: Product Video Automation
use_cases.description: Connect product photography to a Flow that generates consistent, on-brand video ads with voiceover and music — repeatable for every new SKU.

use_cases.title: Audiobook Publishing — Long-Form Narration
use_cases.description: Produce full audiobooks with consistent character voices using V3's multi-speaker dialogue mode. Partnerships with HarperCollins and Bookwire.

use_cases.title: Gaming & Animation — Character Voiceover
use_cases.description: Generate expressive character voices with audio tags for emotional direction. Clone or design custom voices and iterate on dialogue without booking studio sessions.

use_cases.title: Corporate Training — Multilingual Learning Content
use_cases.description: Convert training materials into narrated video across languages for global workforces. Used by Deutsche Telekom for internal training and customer-facing content.

timeline.title: Founded
timeline.detail: Dąbkowski (ex-Google) and Staniszewski (ex-Palantir) start ElevenLabs to build human-like AI voice synthesis.

timeline.title: Platform Launch & Series A
timeline.detail: First AI voice model released. $19M from Andreessen Horowitz. 1M+ users by June 2023.

timeline.title: Series B — Unicorn
timeline.detail: $80M raised, $1B+ valuation. Sequoia Capital joins. Dubbing, 28 languages, voice marketplace.

timeline.title: Series C — $3.3B Valuation
timeline.detail: $180M raised, co-led by a16z and ICONIQ Growth. Strategic investors include Deutsche Telekom, LG, HubSpot Ventures. Conversational AI platform launched.

timeline.title: Eleven V3 (Alpha)
timeline.detail: New TTS model with audio tags for emotional control, 70+ languages, Text-to-Dialogue mode for multi-speaker conversations.

timeline.title: Eleven Music
timeline.detail: AI music generation from text prompts. Commercially cleared for ads, film, TV, games. Developed in collaboration with record labels and artists.

timeline.title: Iconic Voice Marketplace
timeline.detail: Michael Caine, Liza Minnelli, Matthew McConaughey and 25+ voices available for licensed commercial use. Rights-holder-controlled marketplace.

timeline.title: Series D — $11B Valuation
timeline.detail: $500M raised led by Sequoia Capital. Platform restructured into ElevenCreative, ElevenAgents, ElevenAPI. V3 exits alpha. $330M ARR. Total funding: $781M.

timeline.title: Flows Launches
timeline.detail: Node-based creative canvas goes live inside ElevenCreative. 35+ image/video models. Reusable templates, batch execution, API access waitlist opens.
